name: HR generalists in small to medium-sized tech companies using Greenhouse for hiring tool
description: For HR generalists in small to medium-sized tech companies processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire productivity. We streamline onboarding tasks instead of manual tracking and email communication.
target_audience: HR generalists in small to medium-sized tech companies using Greenhouse for hiring
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in new hire productivity.
